creator: faulkner@asgard.hos.net
text:
Entry contains

:kb=^H:kd=\EB:kl=\EB:kr=\EC:ku=\EA:\

should contain

:kb=^H:kd=\EB:kl=\ED:kr=\EC:ku=\EA:kh=\EH:\

Fix: 

Change line 
:kb=^H:kd=\EB:kl=\EB:kr=\EC:ku=\EA:\	
to
:kb=^H:kd=\EB:kl=\ED:kr=\EC:ku=\EA:kh=\EH:\
which I got from the 3161 entry just above.
How-To-Repeat: 
mutt and lynx do not work well with current entry.
They work much better with the supplied change.
